creativeApps.title: Creative Apps
creativeApps.subtitle: Connect local design and creative tools, check installation status, and launch automation scripts
creativeApps.launchPendingApproval: {name} launch request submitted; it will run after approval

descriptions.figma: Figma design files · plugin dev · REST API automation
descriptions.blender: Blender headless batch and rendering scripts
descriptions.unity: Unity Editor batch mode and executeMethod workflow
descriptions.unreal: Unreal Editor headless command line and Python scripts

creativeAgent.emptySubtitle: Describe what you want to accomplish in {app}, and the Agent will plan scripts or desktop actions.
creativeAgent.composerHint: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for new line
creativeAgent.noResponseError: No response from Agent. Check backend service or LLM API key configuration.
creativeAgent.sendError: Failed to send. Please try again.
creativeAgent.pluginInstallHint: Open a file in Figma → Right-click → Plugins → Development → Import plugin from manifest → choose web/figma-plugin/build/manifest.json

customization.title: Customization
customization.subtitle: Tune appearance, input, notifications, and default generation for how you work.
customization.desktopNotificationsDesc: Show system notifications when tasks finish or fail.
customization.mediaOutputDesc: Default quality for image and video generation.
customization.submitKeyDescEnter: Enter sends; Shift+Enter inserts a newline.
customization.verboseLoggingDesc: Log detailed execution info to the console.
customization.autoSaveDraftsDesc: Save drafts to history after each reply.
customization.confirmReset: Clear all preferences? This cannot be undone.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Manage connections, skills, scheduled tasks, and MCP servers.
capabilities.subtitleSystem: Configure LLM / media models / API keys under System.

presetCatalog.title: Popular MCP presets (one‑click)
presetCatalog.subtitle: Starts local Streamable HTTP MCPs (DuckDuckGo: uv/pip; Playwright & official Node presets: Node/npx incl. supergateway; fetch/git/time: uv or pip).
presetCatalog.uninstallConfirm: This stops the local process and removes it from the list. Continue?

chatPlatform.title: Chat Platform
chatPlatform.subtitle: Connect Feishu, Discord and other IM platforms to AI Agent for auto-reply in groups and DMs.
chatPlatform.saveHint: Click save to apply your changes.
chatPlatform.feishuSubtitle: Connect via Feishu Open Platform bot events
chatPlatform.globalSettingsSubtitle: Default behavior shared across all chat platforms
chatPlatform.platformsSubtitle: Manage IM platform connections, toggles and credentials
chatPlatform.defaultAgentIdHint: Default Agent ID used when handling platform messages
chatPlatform.feishuStep1: Create a bot app in Feishu Open Platform and obtain App ID and App Secret.
chatPlatform.feishuStep2: Paste the webhook URL below into Events & Callbacks → Request URL, and subscribe to im.message.receive_v1.
chatPlatform.feishuStep3: Configure Encrypt Key and Verification Token for signature verification.
chatPlatform.feishuStep4: Add the bot to a group and @mention it, or send a DM to trigger the Agent.
chatPlatform.discordStep1: Create an Application in Discord Developer Portal and add a Bot.
chatPlatform.discordStep2: Enable MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT in the Bot page and invite the bot to your server.
chatPlatform.discordStep3: Paste the Bot Token below and save. The Gateway will connect automatically after backend restart.

context.title: My context
context.subtitle: Your knowledge graph, memories, and personal context.
context.subtitleHint: Knowledge graph data is assembled live by the API (run the backend locally).
context.dialogPlaceholder: Refresh cadence, layout defaults, entity import—placeholder for now.
context.codegraphSubtitle: Local code knowledge graph via MCP; engine in vendor/codegraph submodule (Node.js 18+).
context.codegraphInitNote: Run ./scripts/setup_codegraph.sh first to build vendor/codegraph; indexing may take 1–2 minutes.
context.codegraphMcpHint: After indexing, launch the codegraph preset under Capabilities → MCP.

codegraphGraph.readyHint: Search symbols or browse by directory scope
codegraphGraph.indexFirst: Index the project to explore the call graph here
codegraphGraph.hint: Force-directed view of symbol relationships. Click a node to expand its neighborhood; leave search empty to cluster by directory scope.

context.sessionsSubtitle: Cross-session search and browse via SQLite FTS
context.sessionsReferenceNote: Reference mode: relevant snippets only, not full threads

memoryPanel.subtitle: Prompt-visible profile and agent memory, separate from RAG, session traces, feedback, and telemetry.
memoryPanel.emptyDefault: No memories yet — they appear after agent runs.
memoryPanel.emptyHits: No hit records yet. Run an agent request with memory recall to see traces here.

memGraph.empty: No graph nodes yet — the map builds as you use the agent.

myComputer.title: My computer
myComputer.subtitle: Local folders tools can search and read file contents from.
myComputer.localFoldersDesc: Grant access so tools can search file contents from these paths.
myComputer.sliderStorageLimitDesc: Indexing pauses once ingested content reaches this cap.
myComputer.sliderMaxFileDesc: Files larger than this limit are skipped during indexing but remain reachable via tool reads.
myComputer.addFolderHint: Enter an absolute path on the server. AI will index and search documents inside.
myComputer.selectFolderHint: Choose a directory on the server to index.

assistantPage.freeChatHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline
assistantPage.footerSuffix: — the router will dispatch to this assistant.

productManager.composerDesc: Describe market, product, or growth questions in plain language. Works alongside quick recipes above.
productManager.composerPlaceholder: e.g. Analyze the AI notes market and suggest 3 differentiated product ideas…
productManager.footerExamples: "Run a competitor scan" or "Brainstorm product ideas"

legalAdvisor.composerDesc: Describe legal, compliance, or contract questions. Output is for reference only — consult a licensed attorney for formal matters.
legalAdvisor.composerPlaceholder: e.g. Are non-compete clauses enforceable for departing employees?
legalAdvisor.footerExamples: "Research labor law cases" or "Run a compliance audit"
legalAdvisor.disclaimer: Output is for research reference only and is not formal legal advice.

adCampaign.composerDesc: Describe your product, channels, budget, or campaign goals for strategy and creative guidance.
adCampaign.composerPlaceholder: e.g. $50k/month SaaS budget — how to split Douyin vs Xiaohongshu?
adCampaign.footerExamples: "Plan ad strategy" or "Write conversion ad copy"

businessPartnership.composerDesc: Describe partnership goals, targets, or contract questions for outreach and proposal guidance.
businessPartnership.composerPlaceholder: e.g. Draft a cold email to K12 channel partners for co-marketing…
businessPartnership.footerExamples: "Draft outreach email" or "Evaluate a partner fit"

procurementAssistant.composerDesc: Describe procurement scenarios, vendors, or cost questions for actionable recommendations.
procurementAssistant.composerPlaceholder: e.g. Compare three cloud vendors and draft RFQ requirements…

gameArt.composerDesc: Describe visual direction, characters, or scenes for art planning and reference suggestions.
gameArt.composerPlaceholder: e.g. Anime RPG — art direction for hero and ice castle hub…
gameArt.footerExamples: "Write a character art brief" or "Define UI art guidelines"

gameDesign.composerDesc: Describe game ideas, systems, or level scope for design frameworks and iteration advice.
gameDesign.composerPlaceholder: e.g. Roguelike deckbuilder — core loop and chapter 1 pacing…
gameDesign.footerExamples: "Write a concept pitch" or "Design a progression system"

programmer.composerDesc: Describe dev, deployment, or infra questions. The agent uses your local environment context.
programmer.composerPlaceholder: e.g. Check Git status and give me a pre-deploy checklist…

chat.defaultImageTask: Continue the creative task from the uploaded image (e.g. image-to-short-video or follow the description).
chat.heroSubtitleLine: The first local multimodal creative platform. One director, a whole agent team.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Describe your idea, and the Bony agent team will handle the rest...
chat.companionInputPlaceholder: Say something—Nova routes you to the best Agent…
chat.companionWelcome: Hi, I'm {name}{titleSuffix}. Ask about weather, trends, or content—just say the word.
chat.voiceInputTitle: Toggle voice input: when on, recognition runs continuously; click again to stop
chat.voiceNotSupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser; try Chrome
chat.voiceMicDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow this site to use the mic in browser settings
chat.panelSubtitle: Models, agent mode & media · MCP & context linked below
chat.prefOnlineSmartDesc: Judge when freshness matters and state limits plainly
chat.prefOnlineOffDesc: Rely on model knowledge & tool outputs—avoid implying browsing
chat.prefUnboundOnDesc: More creative flexibility and fewer needless blocks
chat.prefKnowledgeSmartDesc: Search uploaded docs when relevant and cite source snippets in replies
chat.prefKnowledgeScopedDesc: Search only the document or category you pick for this chat
chat.prefKnowledgeScopeEmpty: No documents yet — upload some on the Knowledge page
chat.prefKnowledgeScopeHint: Pick what this chat should reference
chat.prefKnowledgeOffDesc: Use model knowledge and other tools only; skip private document retrieval
chat.prefMemoryRecallOnDesc: Prefetch relevant long-term memories and allow searchMemory for continuity
chat.prefMemoryRecallOffDesc: Do not read from the vector memory store in this chat
chat.prefMemoryOnDesc: After replies, drafts can still POST to chat history when auto-save is on
chat.prefMemoryOffDesc: Skip writing this session to the chat history archive on this device
chat.topPanelToggleAria: Expand or collapse chat settings on the right
chat.footerTagline: Powered by Bony · Local Multimodal Agent Team
chat.hintMultiAgent: Turn this reference image into a short video or extend it as needed (image-to-video).

workspace.addProjectPromptFallback: No folder picked or no name; enter a project name
workspace.createBranch: Create and check out new branch…
workspace.gitUnavailable: Not a git repo or git unavailable (needs local Next server with repo)
workspace.selectProjectForBranch: Select a project to manage branches
workspace.duplicateProjectName: A project with this name already exists
workspace.filesToggleTitle: Browse files under the workspace root
workspace.inputPlaceholderCode: Ask about code, or attach files from the workspace panel…
